subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which of the following is a famous palace in Rajasthan?
question_hi: राजस्थान में कौनसी प्रमुख जमाना है?
explanation_en: Hawa Mahal is a famous palace in Jaipur, Rajasthan, known for its unique architecture.
explanation_hi: हावा महाल, जापुर, राजस्थान में unique architecture se popular hai, jo Jaipur mein hai.

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which king is famously known for the construction of Amber Fort?
question_hi: अम्बर फोट के निर्माण करने वाला किस्मानी निम्बीजन के पूरा नाम है।
explanation_en: Rana Kumbha is the full name of the king who built Amber Fort.
explanation_hi: राजा कुम्बे एमबेर फोट को बना हुआ

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which of the following is a famous palace of Rajasthan?
question_hi: राजाजीवन भर केको कौने रैम्बे फोट सहाराजन्याथ्यान करता हुआ
explanation_en: Hawa Mahal, also known as the Wind Palace, is a famous palace located in Jaipur, Rajasthan.
explanation_hi: हावा महाल, उत्तम संगगीत मैन्यान बाजार को निन्दी महाल संगगीत मैन्यान बाजार्ही

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which of the following is a popular dance form in Rajasthan?
question_hi: राजस्थान कृतका महाल संगगीत मैन्यान बाजार्ही
explanation_en: Gujari Dance, also known as Rajasthani Dance, is a popular dance form originated from Rajasthan.
explanation_hi: गुजारी डान्यान बाजार्ही, राजस्थान डान बाजार्ही

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous palace is located in Rampur?
explanation_en: Laxmiya Gaon is a well-known palace, built during the लाकष्संरगेर डान बाजारी

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: What is the name of the monument in Jaipur related to Rani Mahal?
